Akhilesh Munjal is a seasoned Shipping, Logistics, and EXIM professional with over 48 years of extensive experience across freight forwarding, container operations, shipping management, logistics consulting, and international trade processes. His professional journey reflects a strong blend of operational leadership, strategic consulting, training, and academic engagement.

Over the years, he has held senior leadership positions, including Regional Manager (North India), managing shipping, container leasing, freight forwarding, depot operations, and related logistics functions. Since 2015, he has been working as an Independent Consultant, advising shipping lines and freight forwarders on operational efficiency, SOP development, compliance frameworks, workforce capability enhancement, and strategic logistics initiatives.

Actively engaged in skill development and industry-oriented education, Dr. Munjal serves as Guest Faculty at Delhi Skill and Entrepreneurship University and Visiting Faculty at Apeejay School of Management. He has also contributed to the design of specialized training programmes, including a Commercial Shipping Training Programme for a leading Indian Institute of Management (IIM). In addition, he is associated with training and mentoring initiatives focused on bridging the gap between academic learning and practical industry requirements.

He is the award-winning author of Handbook of Shipping Process – A User’s Guide to Shipping (Second Edition, 2024), widely referred to by industry practitioners and training institutions. His work is centred on promoting practical, process-driven, and employability-oriented learning in the shipping and logistics sector.
